hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.sh) shellcheck --severity=warning --shell=bash "$FILE" && echo "✓ shellcheck passed";; esac; true'
bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.sh) shfmt -d -i=2 -ci "$FILE" && echo "✓ shfmt passed";; esac; true'
bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.sh) shellharden --check "$FILE" && echo "✓ shellharden passed";; esac; true'
bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.md) rumdl check "$FILE" 2>&1 | grep -v "^warning:" | head -20; echo "✓ rumdl checked";; esac; true'

bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.sql) SIZE=$(stat -f%z "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || stat -c%s "$FILE" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$SIZE" -gt 52428800 ]; then echo "SQL file exceeds 50MB: $((SIZE/1048576))MB"; exit 1; fi; echo "✓ SQL size OK";; esac; true'
bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; NAME=$(basename "$FILE"); case "$NAME" in brewfile|Brewfile) ruby -c "$FILE" >/dev/null && echo "✓ brewfile syntax OK";; esac; true'
bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; NAME=$(basename "$FILE"); case "$NAME" in justfile|Justfile) just --check --fmt --unstable -f "$FILE" && echo "✓ justfile syntax OK";; esac; true'
bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.py) ruff check "$FILE" && echo "✓ ruff check passed";; esac; true'
bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.js|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx|*.mjs|*.cjs) biome check "$FILE" && echo "✓ biome check passed";; esac; true'

bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.yaml|*.yml) yamllint -d "{extends: default, rules: {line-length: {max: 120}, truthy: disable}}" "$FILE" && echo "✓ yamllint passed";; esac; true'
bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.json) python3 -c "import json; json.load(open(\"$FILE\"))" && echo "✓ JSON syntax OK";; esac; true'
bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in */context/*.md|*/context/*/*.md|*/context/*/*/*.md|*/context/*/*/*/*.md|*/.claude/*.md|*/CLAUDE.md) cli/lint-context.sh;; esac; true'

bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in */plugins/*/plugin.json|*/.claude-plugin/plugin.json) NAME=$(echo "$FILE" | sed -E "s|.*/plugins/([^/]+(/[^/]+)?)/\.claude-plugin/plugin\.json|\1|"); cd /private/etc/infra/pub/ai/cli && bun run bin/agents.ts plugin validate "$NAME" --quiet 2>&1 | tail -5;; */.claude-plugin/marketplace.json) cd /private/etc/infra/pub/ai/cli && bun run bin/agents.ts plugin validate-marketplace --quiet 2>&1 | tail -5;; */plugins/*/.lsp.json|*/plugins/*/.mcp.json) echo "⚠ .lsp.json/.mcp.json edited — run: bun run cli/bin/agents.ts plugin validate-all";; esac; true'
